## Bug fixes 
- remove console.log 😢

releases.author: clairefro

## Bug fixes 

- Fixes broken event note links in Bases view introduced in 3.6.1 (resolves #145)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes 
- fixes bug that was rendering Period name incorrectly in Chronos Timeline Bases view

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - Adds `> NOSTACK` flag to optionally suppress item stacking **Without flag (normal behavior)** ````markdown ```chronos - [2019~2021] {Group A} baz - [2021~2022] #green {Group A} foo - [2020~2022] #green {Group B} bar - [2022~2025] {Group B} bam ``` ```` **With `NOSTACK` flag** ````markdown ```chronos > NOSTACK - [2019~2021] {Group A} baz - [2021~2022] #green {Group A} foo - [2020~2022] #green {Group B} bar - [2022~2025] {Group B} bam ``` ````

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes 
- Bases: Fixes bug that was rendering 'undefined' groups when no group property selected

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new Enhancements for Chronos Timeline view in Obsidian Bases : - Grouping enabled - Configure custom property names from settings (ex: `myStart`) - Ability to use formulas instead of frontmatter for properties Learn about about using [Chronos Timeline with Bases](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/blob/main/README.md#obsidian-bases-view) ### Bases: Grouping ### Bases: Custom property names ### Bases: Option to use Formulas Calculate dynamic values with logic ## Breaking changes If you've already created Chronos Timeline Bases views, in order for them to continue render correctly you'll need to ensure **all relevant Properties are selected** in your views.

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes

- Fixes scroll-blocking violation for non-passive event listeners

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new Announcing Chronos Timeline Bases view! 🎉 ![ex-chronos-bases-demo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/afe9a3c0-fd8c-4ac2-afd1-4d58e52c08c9) - Generate dynamic timeline views by adding front matter properties such as `start` to your notes - Clickable items in Bases view automatically link to notes - Copy generated markdown from Bases view to paste in notes - Get compressed shareable link (stripped of wikilinks) of your timeline to share with friends online using [Chronos Timeline Markdown Playground](https://clairefro.github.io/chronos-timeline-md) - Learn more about the [Chronos Timeline Bases View here](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos?tab=readme-ov-file#obsidian-bases-view) ## Bug fixes - Fixes broken `roundRanges` setting. Round endcaps on ranges now show when enabled

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## Security improvements - Uses Obsidian's new Secrets feature to safely store your API keys

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## Performance improvements - Makes caching opt-in by default. Enabling enhances the "Generate timeline from folder" feature by showing only folders with chronos items

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes 
- Fixes corrupt dependency that broke update and install (#117)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## What's new
- **These "What's new" announcements** - can update your preferences in settings
- **Generate combined timelines from folders** (`Cmd/Ctrl` + `P` > Generate timeline from folder) 
- **Inline Chronos items** collect events with lightweight inline tags: `chronos [Date] Event name`. [See docs](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos?tab=readme-ov-file#generate-timeline-from-folder)

![ex-combined-timeline-from-folder](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e334992e-0ca1-4a4b-af40-dff8fb606078)

## New contributors 
- 🎉 [@xAlessandroC](https://github.com/xAlessandroC) took initiative on the combined timeline and inline chronos item features ([PR #112](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/pull/112)) Thank you!

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new ### More model options for generating timelines with AI - **Adds Google Gemini** (free tier available) ([user request #108](vscode-file://vscode-app/Applications/Visual%20Studio%20Code.app/Contents/Resources/app/out/vs/code/electron-browser/workbench/workbench.html)) - **Adds GPT-5 family support (OpenAI)** (not recommended - it's slow. Stick with the default `gpt-4o-mini`) - **Adds Settings to configure models and API keys**

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Housekeeping 
- removed developer debug logs 😬

![chronos-width-expand](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d7390230-8205-48c4-835f-4b69b40dba4d)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - **🎉 Render Chronos Timelines anywhere!** Chronos Timelines are now renderable and shareable **anywhere**, even outside Obsidian. Try the [online playground](https://clairefro.github.io/chronos-timeline-md) - **Custom colors** You can now use hexcode colors for Events and Periods (ex: `#87ca1a` <-- funky green) ## Internal - Plugin now uses a decoupled [chronos-timeline-md](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chronos-timeline-md) library under the hood

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - **Settings: Optionally disable AI features** if you want nothing to do with it. Contributed by @izcet and @ChrisRenfrow in [pull #76](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/pull/76) ## New Contributors - @izcet and @ChrisRenfrow made their first contribution in [pull #76](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/pull/76)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes
- Fixes date format bug [#66](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/issues/66)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes
- Resolves date locale conflicts with other Obsidian plugins ([#66](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/issues/66))

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
<!-- include -->
## What's New
- **Adds `HEIGHT` flag**  to optionally limit timeline height, with vertical scrolling ([#61](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/pull/61))
 
````markdown
```chronos
> HEIGHT 300

- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 1
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 2
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 3
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 4
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 5
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 6
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 7
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 8
- [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo 9
```
````
![ex-height](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d3d336cf-cefa-4741-8636-c5debfc7b06b)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - **Adds `NOTODAY` flag** to optionally hide the current time marker in specific timelines Without flag (default): ````markdown ```chronos - [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo ``` ```` With flag: ````markdown ```chronos > NOTODAY - [2025-02-02~2025-03-28] foo ``` ````

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - **Adds Chinese (simplified and traditional)** ([user request #52](https://github.com/clairefro/obsidian-plugin-chronos/issues/52)) ## Bug fixes - Fixes bug where locale wasn't being applied

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes 
- fixes zoom bug that broke timeline rendering at >9500 year range

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes 
- Fixes bug that was opening three new leaves when clicking a linked note with Shift/Command/Middle click (#50 )

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's New - **Adds option to disable UTC time** if using Chronos for intra-day tasks

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - **Adds option to enable rounded time range end caps** so you can tell which ranges extend beyond the current view window

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: ## What's new - **Display previews of linked notes** by hovering on an item and pressing Control or Command (#43) - **Adds option to require clicking on a timeline to use zoom controls** (#47)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
## Bug fixes
- Fixes bug that persisted middle-click cursor icon when linking to notes in Windows (I hope) (#34 )
- Fixes rendering of timelines with groups that have DEFAULT_VIEW (#41)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
<!-- include -->
## What's new
- Adds `DEFAULTVIEW` flag for setting initial timeline range 

````markdown
```chronos
> DEFAULTVIEW  -3000|3000

- [2024] AGI
```
````
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/90ecbf81-c71c-445b-913b-2e4e915a414b)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
- Updates link behavior
**Left-click**: Opens link in current tab
**Middle-click or Shift + Click**: Opens link in new tab

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
- adds note linking (#7 )
- fixes grid colors to match your theme (#27) 

![ex-note-linking](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ebc80058-99d4-4d64-a971-c3a6b72003f4)

````markdown
```chronos
- [2021~2022] No link
- [2023~2024] With link [[path/to/note]]
- [2022~2024] Link in description | [[path/to/note]]
* [2022] Link in description | [[path/to/note]]
```
````

![ex-note-linking-2](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/75745577-790c-4503-89e8-99f2879762ba)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
<!-- include -->

## What's new
- adds `ORDERBY` flag to sort the stack of timeline items by property(ies)

````markdown
```chronos
> ORDERBY start

- [2026~2028] Event D
- [2024~2028] Event B
- [2025~2030] #red Event C
- [2020~2030] #red  Event A
```
````

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f78d2267-87b1-43ed-8e07-b17495ff622f)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
- Fixes #19 (Correct text color on Points with colored backgrounds)
- Fixes #23 (Prevent items without group label in data sets with groups present from disappearing)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: - adds Points to generative AI feature

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
- adds **Points** 

Syntax

```
* [Date] Point Name | Description
```

````markdown
```chronos
- [2024-02-26~2024-03-10] Tournament
* [2024-02-26] Game 1 | Austin
* [2024-02-28] Game 2 | Los Angeles
* [2024-03-06] Game 3 | Tokyo
* [2024-03-10] Game 4 | Jakarta
```
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/047744b4-e583-4247-b4ae-47469ef105cf)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
- Fix UTC time display bug (#8) 
- Add granular error messages for date validation
- Allow blank event titles (#11)

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a5d39b92-b9f9-45e4-b159-78962160c202)

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description: - fixes time display bug in tooltips, forcing UTC time

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
- adds ability to use "now" as the default time in a range. "Now" is time of render

example
````markdown
```chronos
- [ 1980~] This event is 1980 until now
```
````

releases.author: clairefro
releases.description:
